token_ttl.description: Specifies the duration for which App Check tokens exchanged from App Attest artifacts will be valid. If unset, a default value of 1 hour is assumed. Must be between 30 minutes and 7 days, inclusive. A duration in seconds with up to nine fractional digits, ending with 's'. Example: "3.5s".

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
